notes: This game uses EA's Javelin. a Kernel-level Anti-cheat that intentionally blocks the game from running on Linux, even name-dropping the Steam Deck in the error message that shows when attempting to load the game. This game's predecessor "Plants vs. Zombies: Garden Warfare" works perfectly on Linux and Steam Deck. however, said game is only availible on the EA Launcher, which requires a bit of tinkering to set up.
